infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PaceFrame needs access to your photos so you can select images and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PaceFrame needs access to your photo library to save exported images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PaceFrame needs camera access so you can capture media.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: PaceFrame reads your workouts to generate visuals from your activity data.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: PaceFrame may write workout-related metadata when you choose to save your generated content.

plugins.photosPermission: PaceFrame needs access to your photos so you can select images and videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: PaceFrame needs camera access so you can capture media.

plugins.photosPermission: PaceFrame needs media library access to save exported images.
